data.title: Tesla Inching Closer To Launch Cybertruck In China? EV Giant Makes Regulatory Filing After Shooting Down Rumors
data.description: Tesla has spurred speculation about the Cybertruck being introduced in China by reportedly filing with one of China's regulatory bodies.

data.title: Microsoft Expects $800 Million Impairment Charge Due To GM's Cruise Exit, Analyst Says It's A 'Step In The Right Direction' For Automaker
data.description: Microsoft Corp (NASDAQ: MSFT) has said that it will be recording an impairment charge of approximately $800 million in the second quarter of fiscal year 2025, according to an SEC filing. This follows General Motors Co (NYSE: GM) exit from funding Cruise‘s robotaxi development.

data.title: Adobe, Broadcom And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Thursday
Jeff Bezos Prefers Confrontation Over Quick Compromises, Reveals Former VP, Says 'Disagree And Commit' Philosophy Led To Amazon's Growth
data.description: A former Amazon executive has provided rare insights into Jeff Bezos' management philosophy that helped build the e-commerce giant into a $2.4 trillion company.
